language.name: 简体中文
ctt_Lobby_Command_Block_1: 如果游戏因为某种原因出现问题
ctt_Lobby_Command_Block_2: 导致您被困在某个关卡中无法离开，
ctt_Lobby_Command_Block_3: 您可以输入“/Trigger Softlocked”来重置本层……
ctt_Lobby_Command_Block_4: 只有管理员才能使用此指令
ctt_Lobby_Command_Block_5: 所以您必须输入“/tag（玩家名称）add OP”指令
ctt_Lobby_Command_Block_6: 然后就可以使用该指令
ctt_Lobby_Command_Block_7: 注意：只有当您被困在某个关卡无法离开
ctt_Lobby_Command_Block_8: 或有其他人被困在某个关卡无法离开时
ctt_Lobby_Command_Block_9: 才能使用（只能在默认的爬塔模式里使用）
ctt_Lobby_Command_Block_10: 如果您遇到了Bug，请在 Discord 上反馈。
ctt_Lobby_Command_Block_13: 然后将该Bug提交至 #bug-reports 板块
ctt_Lobby_Command_Block_14: 反馈后这个Bug将在下次更新中修复！
ctt_Lobby_Command_Block_15: 这里是蛋糕塔中所有的货币类型。
ctt_Lobby_Command_Block_16: 将鼠标移动至您想要查看的货币上。
ctt_Lobby_Command_Block_18: 高塔代币是主要的货币。可以通过游戏过程获得。可在代币商店中购买自定义装扮、额外的地牢以及物品。
ctt_Lobby_Command_Block_20:
蛋糕币是高级货币，可以通过游戏过程获得，但大部分情况下是通过购买或成为patreon会员来获取的。

可在高级代币商店购买自定义装扮及其他商品

如果这是普通版存档，那么蛋糕币无法购买高级商品，需要购买高级版存档才能使用。在高级版存档中，可以通过抵达塔顶更快地获得蛋糕币。
ctt_Lobby_Command_Block_22: 每 100 个蛋糕碎片可兑换成一个蛋糕币。
ctt_Lobby_Command_Block_24: 卡伊币是一种特殊的货币，只能用于卡伊岛或由卡伊族经营的商店中消费。
ctt_Lobby_Command_Block_26:
时间齿轮用于时间守护者通行证。每 100 个时间齿轮即可升级一次。时间齿轮可以通过完成进度或从命令宝箱中获得。

最大上限为 1500 个时间齿轮
ctt_Lobby_Command_Block_28: 用于在彼端守护者商店购买商品
ctt_Lobby_Command_Block_30: 属性点用于强化不同类型的武器或能力，
ctt_Lobby_Command_Block_45: 您可以通过物品、提升属性等级来获得属性点；
ctt_Lobby_Command_Block_46: 同时，部分角色初始就自带一定的属性点。
ctt_Lobby_Command_Block_31: 您可以输入“/Trigger ViewStats”来查看属性点
ctt_Lobby_Command_Block_32: 将鼠标移动至您想要查看的属性点上。
ctt_Lobby_Command_Block_34:
红心是您的常规生命值，类似于 Minecraft 中的生命值；在蛋糕塔中，它表现为顶端的一条Boss栏。

当红心归零时，您就会死亡。红心数量不能超过最大生命值
ctt_Lobby_Command_Block_36: 魂心类似于 Minecraft 中“伤害吸收”提供的额外防护，它们可以超出您的最大生命值
ctt_Lobby_Command_Block_38: 黑心与魂心类似。但失去黑心时，会对周围所有的敌人造成伤害
ctt_Lobby_Command_Block_40: 蓝心与魂心类似。但蓝心只能持续一关，且每次回到休息室时就会消失
ctt_Lobby_Command_Block_42:
职业属性会根据您所扮演的角色，提升相应的属性点

比如：扮演斯旺时，职业属性会提升力量属性

具体效果请查看您的职业被动说明
ctt_Lobby_Command_Block_44: 力量属性决定了近战攻击时可造成的伤害
ctt_Lobby_Command_Block_48: 攻击速度属性可以降低近战攻击冷却时间，同时提升体力恢复速度
ctt_Lobby_Command_Block_50: 决定了您的体力随时间恢复的速度
ctt_Lobby_Command_Block_52:
决定了您可以拥有多少的体力

体力可以用于发动近战武器的各种特殊技能
ctt_Lobby_Command_Block_54:
远程属性可以提升远程武器的伤害。

同时，每次回到休息室时，会根据远程属性获得相应数量的箭或者子弹。对于灵魂弹药，手持它们并按下 Shift 键，可以在灵魂之箭/灵魂子弹之间切换
ctt_Lobby_Command_Block_56:
防御会减少所受到的伤害

防御上限为 20，超出部分将转化为真•盔甲
ctt_Lobby_Command_Block_58:
根据你的真•盔甲获得伤害减免

（最多获得 75% 伤害减免）
ctt_Lobby_Command_Block_60:
治疗力决定了你能获得多少治疗水晶

治疗水晶用于充能治疗物品
ctt_Lobby_Command_Block_62:
再生会使你随时间逐渐恢复生命值

1 再生 = +1 红心/秒
ctt_Lobby_Command_Block_64:
治疗加成决定你在回到休息室后，可恢复多少生命值

基于你的最大生命值获得恢复：假设治疗加成为 25%，且最大生命值为 200，则你将恢复 50 点红心
ctt_Lobby_Command_Block_66:
增加你所获得的治疗量

假设你拥有 50% 额外治疗量，且治疗了 100 点，则你将额外治疗 50 点
ctt_Lobby_Command_Block_68:
其作用类似于防御，但仅针对火元素伤害

当你掉进熔岩或接触到火焰时，火焰护甲将提供临时的抗火效果
ctt_Lobby_Command_Block_70:
其作用类似于防御，但仅针对水元素攻击

此外，可以延长你在水下呼吸的时间
ctt_Lobby_Command_Block_72: 其作用类似于防御，但仅针对电元素攻击
ctt_Lobby_Command_Block_74:
其作用类似于防御，但仅针对冰元素攻击

当你受到伤害时，有几率冻结敌人

当你受到伤害时，有几率使附近的敌人遭受雷击
ctt_Lobby_Command_Block_76:
其作用类似于防御，但仅针对暗元素攻击

每到休息室时，每 1 点暗之加护提供 2 点黑心
ctt_Lobby_Command_Block_78:
其作用类似于防御，但仅针对光元素攻击

有几率免除所受到的伤害（基于光之加护的百分比几率）
ctt_Lobby_Command_Block_82: 决定了你能造成的魔法伤害
ctt_Lobby_Command_Block_84:
决定了你的法力值上限

你的法力值回复的速度也基于你的法力值上限（最大30）
ctt_Lobby_Command_Block_86:
决定了你的跳跃高度

如果你的跳跃为负数，你在跳跃的时候会受到伤害
ctt_Lobby_Command_Block_88: 决定了你的主动物品充能上限
ctt_Lobby_Command_Block_90: 决定了你在每个休息室获得的主动物品充能
ctt_Lobby_Command_Block_92:
给予你额外的召唤力，可用于在使用需要召唤力的物品时增强那些召唤物们，对饰品无效。

增加鞭子的伤害
ctt_Lobby_Command_Block_94:
在每一关卡开始每一点渔技给予你一条灵魂诱饵

增加钓鱼速度

增加获取到稀有鱼的概率
ctt_Lobby_Command_Block_96:
每一点蚂蚁点分别给予你跟蚂蚁相关的能力

负数蚂蚁点将会带来麻烦
ctt_Lobby_Command_Block_98:
每一点蜜蜂点分别给予你跟蜜蜂相关的能力

负数蜜蜂点将会带来麻烦
ctt_Lobby_Command_Block_100:
通过“做好事”获得

100光明业力可以进行一次天使交易
ctt_Lobby_Command_Block_102:
通过“作孽”获得

100黑暗业力可以进行一次恶魔交易
ctt_Lobby_Command_Block_104:
完成业力挑战关卡后获得

可以在主商店的对应教堂中被转化成光明或黑暗业力
ctt_Lobby_Command_Block_106: 真•火之加护可以减免火焰伤害，最多减免 75%
ctt_Lobby_Command_Block_108: 每有 1 点攻击距离属性 +0.25 格攻击距离
ctt_Lobby_Command_Block_112: 增加跳跃高度，并延长从高处下落至地面的滞空时间
ctt_Lobby_Command_Block_118: 根据点数，每次抵达休息室后你的最大生命值和硬币会发生变化
ctt_Lobby_Command_Block_123: 如何安装EMF & ETF教程 | 作者：
ctt_Lobby_Book_1:
Horriculture Growth Stimulatior Experiemnt
==================
Specimen 1:

Rosa Ignus
"§cFire Rose§0"

==================

Start date:
September 21st 2023

==================
ctt_Lobby_Book_2:
Day 1:

Specimen has been injected with artifical grown stimulant

currently being kept in medical tent

no notable results so far
ctt_Lobby_Book_3:
Day 3:

Subject is growing faster than typical, but has not gotten larger than any recorded instances

Subject moved to experimental flower garden so roots can spread
ctt_Lobby_Book_4:
Day 4:

Subject seems to be producing more heat that others of it's species

Nearby flowers also seem to be growing larger
ctt_Lobby_Book_5:
Day 7

Flower has grown to about 7 meters tall, about 6 1/2 meters taller than the larges recorded specimen

Heat produced by specimen is starting to become detrimemtal to nearby vegetation and uncomfortable to humans
ctt_Lobby_Book_6:
Day 9

Large explosion heard from site of specimen at apoxamately 2:23 AM

Currently investigating along with group doctor
ctt_Lobby_Book_7:
Day 10

Flower appears to have ignited the area surounding it, along with nearby Clematis Fragor growths causing small explosion

no damage to reasearch tent, flames under control
ctt_Lobby_Book_8:
Day 11

Falmes have stopped spreading, but have yet to disipate without outside intervention

Forcasted rain will likely extenguish flames

Specimen has stunted growth
ctt_Lobby_Book_9:
Day 13

Flame rekindled day after rainstorm, cause currently unknown

all experimentiation with specimen 1 shall be halted for the time being, growth serum to be further developed and experimented with
ctt_Lobby_Book_10:
Horriculture Growth
Stimulant Experiment
===================
Specimen 7:

Tulipa Gelus
"Ice Tulip"

===================

Start date:
July 7th 2024

==================
ctt_Lobby_Book_11:
Day 0

Specimen selected and experimination of growth stimulant resumed at request of associate

associate wishes for easy accses to snow and ice year round in temperant eviroment
(lack of frezer also given as reason)
ctt_Lobby_Book_12:
Day 1

Preperations complete

Specimen will be directly injected with newest version of growth serum shortly

subject will then be watered with mixture  of water, growth serum, and zunzite granules
ctt_Lobby_Book_13:
Day 2

Specimen has been moved from experimental flower garden to clearing in nearby woods due to rapidly increasing size

root network slightly severed in process due to non-expert assosiates
ctt_Lobby_Book_14:
Day 3

Subject growing rapidly now about 7 meters tall

shortest time to reach this height was previously specimen 2 taking 6 days, height only beten by specimen 4 reaching 8 meters tall in 9 days
ctt_Lobby_Book_15:
Day 4

Specimen has reached 10 meters tall

Frost produced is minimal, in order to fufill request watering  will be continued with mixture
ctt_Lobby_Book_16:
Day 5

Watering has ceased due to discovery of extremely frozen soil preventing more mixture from reaching the roots

Nearby plants have also started slowly wilting
ctt_Lobby_Book_17:
Day 8

after no notable changes for 2 days, flower has reached height of 30+ meters

Ground surounding area has started to thaw however

Surounding air is much colder
ctt_Lobby_Book_18:
Day 9

Rain storm has become snow storm in area near specimen despite time of year

other nearby areas still record rain
ctt_Lobby_Book_19:
Day 11

Most snow in area has melted with the expection of the area directly surounding specimen

Associate now requesting procces repeated on Syringa Caligo
ctt_Lobby_Book_20:
Day 12
Specimen has stopped growth at aproximetly 45 meters tall

Assiociate continues to request modification of Syringa Caligo for unkown reasons

Request likely to be denied due to danger of requested subject
ctt_Lobby_Book_21:
Please note that any minigames blocked off means that there are either no players online with the minigame unlocked.

Or the minigame is blocked due to a Towers run/Other minigame currently being played :)
ctt_Lobby_Book_22:
Only Up

1+ Players

Start from the bottom and climb to the top in a parkour map inspired by the hit game "Only Up"

Good Luck :D
ctt_Lobby_Book_23:
The Race

1-10 Players

Unlock Requirement
Sometimes appears in the Token shop to purchase

Race against your friends and AI in a horse racing game
ctt_Lobby_Book_24: Each horse comes with random stats, and abilities, let the best (or more accurate, luckiest) Jockey win!
ctt_Lobby_Book_25:
Jelly Trials

1+ Players

4 Parkour courses
themed around Swan Jellys Wallride ability

Good Luck :D
ctt_Lobby_Book_26:
Magum Trials
1-10 Players

A "choose your own path" take on the normal Tower gameplay, where you will progress through Magum's 10 custom levels!

Each defeat makes you stronger.
ctt_Lobby_Book_27:
Snowball Civilization
2+ Players (Recommended 5-10)

In this minigame you are sent into an arena where you must snowball fight the other players.

Collect Powerups to make your snowballs stronger and become the strongest!!
ctt_Lobby_Book_28:
being sad makes others sad

which means its a bad thing to be sad

but there comes a day to be sad, because sometimes being sad isnt that bad
ctt_Lobby_Book_29: can't belive i died, not that it matters, being a powerful necromancer and all, but it is weird being trapped underground, at least i have this book with me, probably should start trying to escape now....
ctt_Lobby_Book_30:
第一步：启用服务器资源包

在服务器列表中，选中蛋糕塔服务器，点击 编辑，将 服务器资源包 启用 。

进入服务器时，资源包会自动下载。
ctt_Lobby_Book_31:
第二步：安装EMF & ETF

这个房间里有下载 EMF & ETF 的按钮。如果你不知道如何安装 EMF & ETF，右键墙上的按钮，会跳转到 YouTube 教程。
ctt_Lobby_Book_32:
第三步：问题如果还没有解决

如果按照以上步骤操作后，物品材质和实体模型仍然不显示，你可以在 Discord 上求助。

输入 /trigger Discord 获取链接，我和其他人都可以帮忙！
